title: Ror Ithh
content:

{{Youmay|the [[Ithorian/Legends|Ithorian]] [[Cantina/Legends|cantina]] crawler|the [[Dark Acolyte/Legends|Dark Acolyte]] [[Ror]]}}

'''Ror Ithh''' was an unsavory<ref name="Jedi">{{SWArchive|url=episode-ii/explore/attack/2003/11/imageattack20031106.html|series=Image Attack|text=Jedi Business}}</ref> [[Ithorian/Legends|Ithorian]] [[Cantina/Legends|cantina]] crawler<ref name="CSWE" /> and carouser<ref name="Jedi" /> who frequented the [[Outlander Club/Legends|Outlander Club]],<ref name="CSWE" /> a [[Nightclub/Legends|nightclub]] and [[Gambling/Legends|gambling]] hall in the [[Uscru Entertainment District/Legends|Uscru Entertainment District]] of the<ref name="Club">{{CSWECite|II|431|Outlander Club}}</ref> [[Planet/Legends|planet]]<ref name="Complete Locations">[[Star Wars: Complete Locations (2005)|''Star Wars: Complete Locations'']]</ref> [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]],<ref name="Club" /> in the [[Standard year/Legends|years]] surrounding the [[First Battle of Geonosis/Legends|First Battle of Geonosis]]<ref name="CSWE" /> of [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]].<ref name="NEC" /> During a [[Local day/Legends|night]]<ref name="AOTC" /> in that year,<ref name="NEC">''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'' dates the events of {{Film|II}} to [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]].</ref> Ithh was visiting the club, just as [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] [[Zam Wesell/Legends|Zam Wesell]] ran into the club to hide after her [[Plot to assassinate Senator Amidala/Legends|assassination attempt]] on [[Senator/Legends|Senator]] [[Padmé Amidala/Legends|Padmé Amidala]]. Ithh stood next to<ref name="AOTC" /> the [[Gran/Legends|Gran]] [[Gambler/Legends|gambler]] [[Nic Whoma]]<ref name="Jedi" /> as [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Padawan/Legends|Padawan]] [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Anakin Skywalker]] searched for Wesell. When Skywalker surveyed the crowd, Ithh interacted with two [[Rodian/Legends|Rodians]].<ref name="AOTC" />

Ithh wore dark [[Robe/Legends|robes]] while at the club and had [[Color/Legends|brown]] skin and black [[Eye/Legends|eyes]].<ref name="AOTC" /> Ithh had a [[Gender/Legends|male]] first name that meant "strong, mighty." The carouser's surname was an Ithorian family name that meant "soil," specifically rich and growing soil.<ref name="GalacticCampaign">''[[Galactic Campaign Guide]]''</ref>

==Behind the scenes==
{{Quote|Now appearing two-for-two in appearing at Star Wars bars, Hammerheads seem to get around|Daniel Wallace|<ref name="Insider">{{InsiderCite|75|Who's Who in the Outlander Club: It's Ladies' Night}}</ref>}}
Ror Ithh first appeared in the [[2002]] [[prequel trilogy]] film [[Star Wars: Episode II Attack of the Clones|''Star Wars'': Episode II ''Attack of the Clones'']].<ref name="AOTC" /> The Outlander Club scenes, in which the character was played by an uncredited extra, were filmed at [[Fox Studios, Sydney]], on [[July 17]], [[2001]].<ref name="Mythmaking">''[[Mythmaking: Behind the Scenes of Attack of the Clones]]''</ref> The name Ror Ithh first appeared in the [[May 2]], [[2003]], web article "[[Cantina Roll-Call: Shedding Light on Some Alien Aliases]]," where it was applied to the<ref name="Cantina">{{SWArchive|url=episode-iv/bts/article/f20030502/index.html|text=Cantina Roll-Call: Shedding Light on Some Alien Aliases|int=Cantina Roll-Call: Shedding Light on Some Alien Aliases}}</ref> Ithorian [[Momaw Nadon/Legends|Momaw Nadon]].<ref name="Nadon">{{DB|character|momawnadon|Nadon, Momaw}}</ref> The name was first applied to the Ithorian appearing in Episode II through the [[StarWars.com]] [[Image Attack]] feature on [[November 6]], 2003.<ref name="Jedi" /> In the article "[[Who's Who in the Outlander Club: It's Ladies' Night]],"<ref name="Insider" /> published on [[April 6]], [[2004]],<ref name="SW.com">{{SWArchive|url=community/fanclub/mag/news20040315.html|text=The New Face of Evil}}</ref> in the [[Star Wars Insider 75|seventy-fifth]] issue of the ''[[Star Wars Insider]]'' magazine, author [[Daniel Wallace]] remarked that Ithh had a rather literal surname, and that Ithorians seemed to frequent the bars in ''[[Star Wars]]'' films.<ref name="Insider" />
